shieldStatusDesc: Your AI shield is protecting you from digital deception.

landing.heroTitle: Secure Verification Against AI Disinformation & Deepfakes
landing.heroDesc: TruthShield AI leverages double neural network layers to verify news articles, URL reputations, synthesized images, and frame-by-frame deepfake video streams. Inspect models and download PDF threat dossiers in real time.
landing.feature1Desc: Analyze text segments or upload PDF files. Inspects emotional bias density, clickbait structures, and factual reference indexes.
landing.feature2Desc: Scan photo profiles for neural generator traces. Checks frequency irregularities, lighting distortions, and irregular pupil shapes.
landing.feature3Desc: Examine video tracks frame by frame. Detects face boundaries anomalies, synthetic lip syncing lags, and sound phonation mismatches.
landing.feature4Desc: Validate news websites against reputation registers. Highlights registrar privacy shields, satire ratings, and biased sources.
landing.footerText: © 2026 TruthShield AI. Secured Operations Standard verified.
